messages.content:
“<think>
Okay, the user said "hello". That's a greeting. I should respond politely. Let me make sure to greet them back and offer help. Maybe say something like "Hello! How can I assist you today?" That sounds friendly and open-ended. I should check if there are any other ways to respond, but this seems standard. No need for any markdown, just plain text. Alright, ready to send that.
</think>
  
Hello! How can I assist you today?”
  
python如何取出think tag之外的字符串

可以用正则把 `
<details type="reasoning" done="true" duration="0">
<summary>Thought for 0 seconds</summary>
> ...
</details>
可以用正则把 `` 这段删掉，再对结果做 `strip()`。

```python
import re

s = """
<details type="reasoning" done="true" duration="0">
<summary>Thought for 0 seconds</summary>
> Okay, ...
</details>
可以用正则把 `` 这段删掉，再对结果做 `strip()`。

```python
import re

s = """
  
Hello! How can I assist you today?"""

# 删除
<details type="reasoning" done="true" duration="0">
<summary>Thought for 0 seconds</summary>
> ...
</details>
可以用正则把 `` 这段删掉，再对结果做 `strip()`。

```python
import re

s = """
  
Hello! How can I assist you today?"""

# 删除 （跨多行）
out = re.sub(r"
<details type="reasoning" done="true" duration="0">
<summary>Thought for 0 seconds</summary>
> .*?
</details>
可以用正则把 `` 这段删掉，再对结果做 `strip()`。

```python
import re

s = """
  
Hello! How can I assist you today?"""

# 删除 （跨多行）
out = re.sub(r"", "", s, flags=re.DOTALL).strip()
print(out)
```

如果可能有多个 `
<details type="reasoning" done="true" duration="0">
<summary>Thought for 0 seconds</summary>
> ` 块：
> 
> ```python
> out = re.sub(r"<think>.*?
</details>
\s*", "", s, flags=re.DOTALL).strip()
```

更稳一点（大小写、属性等情况）：

```python
out = re.sub(r"<think\b[^>]*>.*?</think>", "", s, flags=re.DOTALL | re.IGNORECASE).strip()
```
